title: Famous Real Paintings
description: Famous real paintings brought to Minecraft

# Famous Real Paintings

Bring some famous real paintings into your Minecraft world!

Built for (and requires) the [Custom Paintings mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-paintings-mod).

## Project page archived, now available through GitHub

- [https://github.com/Roundaround/famouspaintings](https://github.com/Roundaround/famouspaintings)
- [https://github.com/Roundaround/famouspaintings/releases](https://github.com/Roundaround/famouspaintings/releases)

**As of v3.0.0 of the mod, painting packs are no longer "special" resource packs, but instead their own format.** This means that Modrinth no longer will host them, as they aren't technically resource packs (or datapacks for that matter). In light of this, I've set up a GitHub repo and will be using its "Releases" infrastructure to release new versions of the pack as needed. Sorry for the inconvenience!
